title: Janitor

rationales.taskAutomation: Cleaning varied commercial spaces is unstructured physical work; only floor care in large open areas is meaningfully automatable today.
rationales.toolMaturity: Autonomous floor-scrubbing robots are mature and deployed in large retail and warehouse spaces.
rationales.adoption: Adoption is concentrated in big-box retail and large commercial floors; most janitorial work in smaller or mixed spaces stays manual.
rationales.agenticExposure: Task scheduling and supply reordering are agent-ownable slices; general cleaning and maintenance response are not.

tasksAtRisk: Large open-floor cleaning in retail and warehouse spaces
tasksGrowing: Cleaning irregular and detail-heavy spaces (restrooms, offices)
Handling spills, hazards, and emergency cleanup
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 37-2011, p25-p75 rounded
insight: Autonomous scrubbers already handle open floor space in big-box stores and warehouses overnight. Everything irregular, restrooms, offices, spills, hazards, still needs a person, and increasingly that person also supervises the robot.
